overview: A modern, professional multi-page website for Sharma & Associates, Chartered Accountants — a CA firm based in India. Features a homepage with hero and services, About Us, a detailed Services page with 5 categories, Contact with a form, and a Blog listing. Built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS in a clean navy blue and green corporate design.
features: 5-page website: Home, About, Services, Contact, Blog
Sticky navigation header with mobile hamburger menu
Hero section with CTAs (Get Consultation, File Your ITR Now)
Services grid covering Taxation, Accounting, Audit, Business Registration, NRI Taxation
Blog listing with sample post cards
Navy blue, white, and green corporate design
Fully mobile responsive with Tailwind CSS
Inter font and Lucide React icons throughout
